TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Suru ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Tayang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 95 buwan, 292 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 279 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 13 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 94%, Amis 1%, Rukay 0.5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 0.5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Suru hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Suru hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Suru hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Suru hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Suru hya' ga Sakuhan. tay 'llaw na Suru hya' ga Malabang. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕuru ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu tajaŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, rukaj *.*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *.*%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕuru ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕuru ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕuru ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕuru ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕuru ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕakuħan. taj ʔllaw na s~ɕuru ħjaʔ ɣa malaβaŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Suru ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Tayang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 95 buwan, 292 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 279 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 13 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 94%, Amis 1%, Rukay 0.5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 0.5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Suru hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Suru hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Suru hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Suru hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Suru hya' ga Sakuhan. tay 'llaw na Suru hya' ga Malabang. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕuru ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu tajaŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, rukaj *.*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *.*%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕuru ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕuru ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕuru ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕuru ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕuru ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕakuħan. taj ʔllaw na s~ɕuru ħjaʔ ɣa malaβaŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
